# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Source lineage

State whether this change promotes, rewrites, supersedes or blocks anything from `kevinrapley/flux-behavioural-analytics`.

## Validation

List exact commands run and results.

## Evidence updates

- [ ] `agent-evidence.yaml` updated or not applicable
- [ ] `conformance-matrix.yaml` updated or not applicable
- [ ] `gap-register.yaml` updated or not applicable
- [ ] `harm-register.yaml` updated or not applicable
- [ ] `RECENT_LEARNINGS.md` updated or not applicable

## Risk and rollback

Describe residual risks and how to revert.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets are committed.
- [ ] No personal data or raw telemetry is committed.
- [ ] Branch prefix is approved.
- [ ] CODEOWNERS-sensitive files have owner review.
- [ ] CI status checks are expected to pass.
